name: Skillet Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 12-inch skillet with nonstick spray and coat the pan.
2. Brown chicken pieces on all sides over medium heat for about 15 minutes. Remove the chicken from the skillet.
3. If necessary, drain any fat from the skillet.
4. Add mushrooms, carrots, rice, onion, bouillon, poultry seasoning, 2 cups water, and salt to the skillet.
5. Place the chicken atop the rice mixture. Cover the skillet.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the chicken and rice are fully cooked.
